title: Hotbar Keybinds
description: Show all of your hotbar keybinds in your hotbar!
body:
This mod shows keybind labels on each hotbar slot, making it easy to see which keys access which slots at a glance.

![In-game hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48ccba91a5676ce19f8ae1b7cdfb7816919b8f2f.png)

Display your hotbar keybinds directly on screen!

- **In-game HUD display** - Keybinds appear on your hotbar while playing
- **Inventory screen display** - See keybinds in survival inventory, creative mode, crafting tables, furnaces, chests, and all other container menus
- **Shows your actual keybinds** - Displays whatever keys you've configured
Great for learning new keybinds

**Client-side only** - works on any client without server-side installation.

Fabric API required

Let me know in the comments if you want this for another version.
